creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yusuf Yaman from comment #12)

Your patch does not apply.  Please rebase the patch so it applies on top of the current main branch.

This is most likely because you have some other patch that first goes to 5.6.0 in your tree and the patch you attached goes from 5.6.0 to 5.14.2.
